onChange.script:
AreaID = self.props.value
	if self.props.value==None:
		self.props.value=-1
	AreaOptions =self.props.options
	Areadtset=system.dataset.toPyDataSet(AreaOptions)
	for dt in Areadtset:
		if AreaID==dt['value']:
			AreaName=dt['label']
			self.view.params.AreaName = AreaName
	if self.props.value==-1:
		self.view.params.AreaName=''
		self.view.params.Variant1=''
		self.view.params.Variant2=''
		self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("cntAction_0").getChild("flexApply").getChild("BtnApply").props.enabled=False

config.script:
#CLEAR ALL FILTER SELECTION
	self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("cntFlex").getChild("cntArea").getChild("drpArea").props.value = -1
	self.view.params.Area=-1
	self.view.params.AreaName=''
	self.view.params.Variant1=''
	self.view.params.Variant2=''

"""Created By : Akhil Aerra
		Date : 03.10.2024
		Purpose : Passing entered values to Parameteres""" 
	try:
		if self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("cntFlex").getChild("cntArea").getChild("drpArea").props.value!=-1:
			Area=self.view.params.Area
			ShiftA=1
			ShiftB=2
			ShiftC=3
			Variant1=self.view.params.Variant1
			Variant2=self.view.params.Variant2
			TargetA_1=self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("CntShift_A").getChild("FlexContainer_1").getChild("NumericEntryField").props.value
			TargetA_2=self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("CntShift_A").getChild("FlexContainer_1").getChild("NumericEntryField_0").props.value
			TargetB_1=self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("CntShift_B").getChild("FlexContainer_1").getChild("NumericEntryField").props.value
			TargetB_2=self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("CntShift_B").getChild("FlexContainer_1").getChild("NumericEntryField_0").props.value
			TargetC_1=self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("CntShift_C").getChild("FlexContainer_1").getChild("NumericEntryField").props.value
			TargetC_2=self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("CntShift_C").getChild("FlexContainer_1").getChild("NumericEntryField_0").props.value
			TargetM_1=self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("CntShift_M").getChild("FlexContainer_1").getChild("NumericEntryField").props.value
			TargetM_2=self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("CntShift_M").getChild("FlexContainer_1").getChild("NumericEntryField_0").props.value
			CurrentUserId=self.session.custom.loggedInUserId
			if(Area != -1 and Variant1 != '' and Variant2 != '' and TargetA_1 >= 0 and TargetA_2 >=0 and TargetB_1>=0 and TargetB_2 >= 0 and TargetC_1 >= 0 and TargetC_2 >= 0 and TargetM_1 >= 0 and TargetM_2 >= 0):
				params = [{'Area':int(Area),'Shift':int(ShiftA),'Variant':Variant1,'DailyTarget':int(TargetA_1),'MonthlyTarget':int(TargetM_1),'User':CurrentUserId},
				{'Area':int(Area),'Shift':int(ShiftA),'Variant':Variant2,'DailyTarget':int(TargetA_2),'MonthlyTarget':int(TargetM_2),'User':CurrentUserId},
				{'Area':int(Area),'Shift':int(ShiftB),'Variant':Variant1,'DailyTarget':int(TargetB_1),'MonthlyTarget':int(TargetM_1),'User':CurrentUserId},
				{'Area':int(Area),'Shift':int(ShiftB),'Variant':Variant2,'DailyTarget':int(TargetB_2),'MonthlyTarget':int(TargetM_2),'User':CurrentUserId},
				{'Area':int(Area),'Shift':int(ShiftC),'Variant':Variant1,'DailyTarget':int(TargetC_1),'MonthlyTarget':int(TargetM_1),'User':CurrentUserId},
				{'Area':int(Area),'Shift':int(ShiftC),'Variant':Variant2,'DailyTarget':int(TargetC_2),'MonthlyTarget':int(TargetM_2),'User':CurrentUserId}]
				system.perspective.print(params)
				for i in params:
					result = system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/Master/PlanConfiguration/updatePlanData",i)
					system.perspective.print(result)
	
		   		if(int(result) > 0):		
					state = 'success'
					message = "Plan Data Added successfully."  
					system.perspective.print(message)
				else:
					state = 'error'
					message = "Records not updated. Please contact system administrator."
					system.perspective.print(message)
				Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup","","","","")

	except:     #start of except block          
		screenName ='Plan Configuration'     
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Master/PlanConfiguration')
		errorFunction = str('tbl.Message Handler  -> SrowSelection') 
		errorType=str('Application') 
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description    
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error    
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)
